name: Human Resources
description: Employee management, departments, leave tracking, attendance, and performance reviews

terminology.employee: A staff member with personal details, position, department, and employment history
terminology.department: An organizational unit grouping employees under a common function
terminology.leave_request: A time-off request with type (annual, sick, personal, unpaid), date range, and approval workflow
terminology.attendance: Daily clock-in/clock-out records for tracking work hours
terminology.performance_review: Periodic evaluation of employee performance with ratings, goals, and feedback

common_queries: How many employees are in each department?
Show me all employees hired in the last quarter
What's the average salary by department?
Which employees have upcoming performance reviews?
List all employees on leave this week
Show the org chart for the engineering department

example_interactions.user: Add a new employee to the Engineering department
example_interactions.assistant: I'll help you add a new employee. Please provide: full name, email, position, hire date, and salary. I'll assign them to the Engineering department automatically.
I found John Smith's pending leave request for Annual Leave from March 25-28. Shall I approve it? This will notify John and update the leave calendar.

example_interactions.user: How many sick days has the marketing team used this year?
example_interactions.assistant: The Marketing department (8 employees) has used a total of 23 sick days this year. The average is 2.9 days per employee. Sarah Chen has the most with 6 days.
